attempts.text:
Fireworks bloom bright,
Voices rise with pure delight,
Banners wave in light.
Happy #BastilleDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Fireworks bloom bright,
Laughter echoes through the streets,
Freedom's song takes flight.
Happy #BastilleDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Fireworks burst bright,
Laughter mingles with cool air,
Joy paints the night sky.
Happy #BastilleDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Fireworks burst bright,
Crisp air filled with laughter,
Flags wave in the sun.
Happy #BastilleDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright flags wave with pride,
Crackling fireworks explode,
Laughter fills the night.
Happy #BastilleDay from @ClamBakeSanta
